_comment: operon-plugin hooks. Phase 2 wires SessionStart to bind_handle per SPEC.md section 8 and section 6.5 step 6. The mcp_tool handler form invokes mcp__operon__bind_handle directly; bind_handle reads OPERON_AGENT_HANDLE from its own subprocess env and validates against the session_id supplied by the hook's JSON payload. The matcher 'startup|resume|clear' fires on all SessionStart sources; bind_handle is idempotent so resume/clear re-fires against the same handle succeed.
